tasks.label: Build All
tasks.command: if [ -f /.dockerenv ] || [ -n "$REMOTE_CONTAINERS" ]; then python3 build.py; else docker build -f Dockerfile --target builder -t ndscompiler-builder . && docker run --rm -v "${workspaceFolder}:/test" -w /test ndscompiler-builder python3 build.py; fi

tasks.label: Build All (Latest Toolchain)
tasks.command: if [ -f /.dockerenv ] || [ -n "$REMOTE_CONTAINERS" ]; then echo 'Inside devcontainer: rebuild the devcontainer image to refresh toolchain, then run Build All.' && python3 build.py; else docker build --pull --no-cache -f Dockerfile --target builder -t ndscompiler-builder . && docker run --rm -v "${workspaceFolder}:/test" -w /test ndscompiler-builder python3 build.py; fi

tasks.label: Clean All
tasks.command: find . -maxdepth 1 -name '*.nds' -delete; find . -maxdepth 1 -name 'build.ninja' -delete; find . -maxdepth 1 -name '.ninja_deps' -delete; find . -maxdepth 1 -name '.ninja_log' -delete; find build output architectds/__pycache__ -type f -delete 2>/dev/null || true; find build output architectds/__pycache__ -depth -type d -empty -delete 2>/dev/null || true; if [ ! -f /.dockerenv ] && [ -z "$REMOTE_CONTAINERS" ]; then docker rmi -f ndscompiler ndscompiler-builder nds-devcontainer-test 2>/dev/null || true; fi; echo Clean complete.
